name: Decant
description: Apothecary vessels filling and emptying — liquid levels rise and fall behind steady glass outlines on every redraw.

code.style: --liquid: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --lvl: @rand(8%, 60%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 8% 24%; border: 2px solid var(--color1); border-radius: 14% 14% 26% 26%; opacity: 0.75; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(24% + 2px); right: calc(24% + 2px); bottom: calc(8% + 2px); height: var(--lvl); background: var(--liquid); border-radius: 4% 4% 24% 24%; opacity: 0.85; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
